summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PITCH'D iteration 9 with 13 fixes. All features verified working: Logo 2x bigger, paste-it-pitch-it on right, loading text centered, footer two-line layout, Budget Range dropdown dependent on Budget Tier, structured Notable Attachments with Add Cast, SLATR blue theme, larger logos, unbolded headings, CTA letter-spacing, temperature 0.7, randomisation instruction, and jsPDF+html2canvas PDF export.
test_credentials: None required - no authentication in this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 verified all 13 fixes. Key features tested: 1) Logo size=80 with 264px height, 2) paste-it-pitch-it positioned on right (x=1148), 3) Loading text centered (text-align: center), 4) Footer two-line layout verified, 5) Budget Range dropdown changes based on Budget Tier (Micro: Sweat Equity/$0-$10K/$10K-$50K, Studio: $120M-$200M/$200M+), 6) Notable Attachments has Director/Composer/DOP/Producer fields + Cast with Add Cast button, 7) SLATR card border is blue #3a69b1, 8) SLATR logo 72px, SPOT'D logo 66px, 9) Headings font-weight 400, 10) CTA letter-spacing 0.56px, 11) Backend temperature=0.7, 12) RANDOMISE_INSTRUCTION appended to user prompts, 13) PDF export using jsPDF CDN + html2canvas (downloads .pdf file automatically).
